content.content: Your questions have been answered: "What do you want to do in this modding workspace?"="/Applications/coh /Applications/LaunchCat.app /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app". You can now continue with these answers in mind.

options.description: Extract CityModInstaller.zip and mount/inspect CoHModdingTool.dmg to see what each tool does, without installing anything yet. Safest first step.
options.label: Unpack & inspect tools

options.description: Use one of the tools to actually install a mod into assets/mods/ and verify it loads in-game. Requires picking a mod.
options.label: Install a mod end-to-end

options.description: Establish a clean, repeatable layout/scripts for managing mods in assets/mods/ (backup, enable/disable, changelog) as durable infrastructure.
options.label: Set up modding workflow

options.description: Explain what CoHModdingTool vs CityModInstaller each do and how CoH modding works, no file changes.
options.label: Just orient me

questions.question: What do you want to do in this modding workspace?
